title: Notification issued u/s 7(1) (b) of COFEPOSA Act against Shri Mohammed Basheer

ताप ?सह, संयुत सिचव MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) (CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU) (COFEPOSA WING) ORDER New Delhi, the 9th January, 2020 S.O. 132(E).—Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, specially empowered under sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) issued Order No. PD-12001/54/2019-COFEPOSA dated 31.10.2019 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Mohammed Basheer S/o Shri Kunhiahammed Parakkandy, R/o Kunjahammed, Parakkandi House, Panangad, Kannadipoyil, Balussery, Kozhikode-673612 be detained and kept in Central Prison & Correctional Home, Poojappura, Thiruvananthapuram with a view to preventing him from smuggling of goods, abetting the smuggling of goods and engaging in transporting or concealing or keeping smuggled goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the Order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police & State Police Chief, Government of Kerala, Thiruvananthapuram within 7 days of the publication of this Order in the Official Gazette. [No. PD-12001/54/2019-COFEPOSA] RAVI PRATAP SINGH, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
